action.reasoning: Starting fresh. Need to build CIFAR-100-LT classifier. Plan: Use pretrained ConvNeXt-tiny (28M params, pretrained on IN-22k) with class-balanced cross-entropy loss. CIFAR-100 images are 32x32 so I'll upscale to 224x224. Apply strong augmentation. Use class-balanced sampling or weighted loss to handle imbalance. First iteration: train for 5 epochs to validate pipeline and measure timing.
